name: fast-strict-hybrid
hypothesis: Inject strict's 3 key quality signals (coverage matrix, reproduction commands, zero-tolerance eval) into fast's lean frame. Target: fast-level cost with strict-quality output.

changes.planner: Fast structure + requirement extraction + coverage matrix. Max 5 features / 4 DoD.
changes.adversary: Fast's 5-issue cap + strict's reproduction commands + 3 demands-for-evidence.
changes.evaluator: Fast's concise format + strict's zero-tolerance policy + progress delta.
